meaning: n.(印度教)克利须那神,克利须那河(再印度南部)
examples: Krishna stands downstage in the open area.
As a child Krishna was very fond of milk and milk products.
Krishna at a Khao San tailor shop says his business is suffering.
Krishna Sethia, medical director of the NNUH said the hospital was "delighted" at the additional funding.
Krishna thinks that a job at a call center is the key to tying the knot.
